requirements.summary: Implement yellow color theme with Apple-inspired minimalist design
acceptanceCriteria: Primary color scheme uses yellow as the dominant theme color
Design features clean typography and generous whitespace
Layout is minimalist and visually polished

file_operations.description: Update global styles to establish yellow as the primary theme color. Define CSS custom properties for yellow color palette (primary, light, dark shades). Apply clean typography styles with increased letter-spacing and line-height. Set generous margin and padding defaults for whitespace.

Configure Tailwind theme with yellow color palette as primary. Extend default theme with custom yellow shades. Configure typography plugin for clean, readable font settings. Set spacing scale to support generous whitespace throughout the application.

requirements.summary: Build admin interface for product management
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create new products via a form
Form includes fields for name, category, price, and description
Products are successfully stored in the backend

file_operations.description: Create admin page component with product management form. Include form fields for product name (text input), category (select or text input), price (number input), and description (textarea). Wire form submission to backend addProduct capability. Display success/error feedback after submission. Style with yellow theme and minimalist design.
Add route for /admin path pointing to AdminPage component. Ensure admin route is accessible via navigation or direct URL access.

requirements.summary: Display products with category filtering and customer reviews
acceptanceCriteria: Products are displayed on the main page
Users can filter products by category
Product detail view shows customer reviews below product information

file_operations.description: Create product listing page that fetches all products from backend. Display products in a grid layout with product images (using generated placeholder images from frontend/public/assets/generated/product-placeholder-1.dim_400x400.png, product-placeholder-2.dim_400x400.png, product-placeholder-3.dim_400x400.png), name, category, and price. Implement category filter dropdown that filters displayed products. Wire generated hero banner image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png) into a hero section at the top of the page. Style with yellow theme and generous whitespace.

Create product detail page that displays full product information including name, category, price, description, and product image. Fetch product data by ID from backend. Display customer reviews section below product details showing all reviews for the product. Include 'Add to Cart' button that calls backend addToCart capability. Style with yellow theme and clean typography.
Add route for / (root path) pointing to ProductListPage component. Add route for /product/:id pointing to ProductDetailPage component. Ensure these routes are registered in the application router.

requirements.summary: Implement shopping cart with quantity adjustment and total price
acceptanceCriteria: Cart page displays all items added to cart
Users can adjust item quantities in cart
Total price updates dynamically based on cart contents

file_operations.description: Create cart page that fetches cart items using backend viewCart capability. Display each cart item with product details (name, price), quantity controls (increment/decrement buttons), and subtotal. Call backend addToCart capability when quantity is adjusted. Fetch and display total price using backend calculateTotal capability. Include 'Proceed to Payment' button linking to payment page. Style with yellow theme and clear visual hierarchy.
Add route for /cart path pointing to CartPage component. Ensure cart route is accessible from navigation menu.

Create header navigation component with links to main pages (Products, Cart, Admin). Include cart icon with item count badge. Style with yellow accents and minimal design. Use across all pages for consistent navigation.
Wire Header component into App.tsx layout so it appears on all pages.

requirements.summary: Create payment page with Cash on Delivery and UPI options
acceptanceCriteria: Payment page offers Cash on Delivery option
Payment page offers UPI payment option
UPI payments display or use UPI ID 9892246308-2@axl
Order submission captures payment method choice

file_operations.description: Create payment page with two payment method options: Cash on Delivery (radio button) and UPI (radio button). When UPI is selected, display UPI ID 9892246308-2@axl prominently with copy functionality. Show order summary with total amount from backend calculateTotal capability. Include 'Complete Order' button that calls backend checkout capability with selected payment method. Handle checkout response and show success message. Style with yellow theme and clear payment option presentation.

Create order success page displaying confirmation message after successful checkout. Show order reference/ID returned from backend checkout capability. Include link to return to product listing. Style with yellow theme and celebratory but minimal design.

Add route for /payment path pointing to PaymentPage component. Add route for /order-success path pointing to OrderSuccessPage component. Ensure payment page is accessible from cart page and order success page is accessible after checkout completion.

requirements.summary: Add product search functionality by name or description
acceptanceCriteria: Search bar is visible on the main product listing page
Search filters products by name or description
Search results update dynamically as user types or submits query

file_operations.description: Add search input field to product listing page header/toolbar. Implement search handler that calls backend searchProducts capability with user's search term. Update product display to show search results when search term is present. Include debouncing for search input to avoid excessive backend calls. Show 'No results' message when search returns empty array. Style search bar with yellow accents.

requirements.summary: Display contact information in website footer
acceptanceCriteria: Footer is visible on all pages
Footer displays phone number: 9892246308
Footer displays address: R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI

file_operations.description: Create footer component displaying contact information. Include phone number '9892246308' with phone icon. Include address 'R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI' with location icon. Style with yellow accents on dark or light background for contrast and readability. Ensure footer is responsive and maintains minimalist design.
Wire Footer component into App.tsx layout so it appears at the bottom of all pages.
